2604.23296.title: $\mathcal{S}^2$IT: Stepwise Syntax Integration Tuning for Large Language Models in Aspect Sentiment Quad Prediction
2604.23296.paper_summary: Aspect Sentiment Quad Prediction (ASQP) has seen significant advancements, largely driven by the powerful semantic understanding and generative capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, while syntactic structure information has been proven effective in previous extractive paradigms, it remains underutilized in the generative paradigm of LLMs due to their limited reasoning capabilities. In this paper, we propose S^2IT, a novel Stepwise Syntax Integration Tuning framework that progressively integrates syntactic structure knowledge into LLMs through a multi-step tuning process. The training process is divided into three steps. S^2IT decomposes the quadruple generation task into two stages: 1) Global Syntax-guided Extraction and 2) Local Syntax-guided Classification, integrating both global and local syntactic structure information. Finally, Fine-grained Structural Tuning enhances the model's understanding of syntactic structures through the prediction of element links and node classification. Experiments demonstrate that S^2IT significantly improves state-of-the-art performance across multiple datasets. Our implementation will be open-sourced at https://github.com/DMIRLAB-Group/S2IT.
2604.23296.paper_summary_zh: Aspect Sentiment Quad Prediction (ASQP) 已經取得了重大進展，這主要得益於大型語言模型 (LLMs) 強大的語義理解和生成能力。<lb/>然而，儘管語法結構信息在先前的提取範式中已被證明是有效的，但由於 LLMs 的推理能力有限，它在生成範式中仍然未被充分利用。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了 S^2IT，一種新穎的逐步語法整合調整框架，通過多步調整過程逐步將語法結構知識整合到 LLMs 中。<lb/>訓練過程分為三個步驟。<lb/>S^2IT 將四元組生成任務分解為兩個階段：1) 全局語法引導提取和 2) 局部語法引導分類，整合全局和局部的語法結構信息。<lb/>最後，細粒度結構調整通過元素鏈接和節點分類的預測增強了模型對語法結構的理解。<lb/>實驗表明，S^2IT 在多個數據集上顯著提高了最先進的性能。<lb/>我們的實現將在 https://github.com/DMIRLAB-Group/S2IT 開源。
2604.23296.author: Bingfeng Chen et.al.
2604.23296.authors: Bingfeng Chen, Chenjie Qiu, Yifeng Xie, Boyan Xu, Ruichu Cai, Zhifeng Hao
